data.title: Hong Kong's Airstar Bank Rebrands to EleBank
data.description: Hong Kong's digital bank, Airstar Bank, has announced a rebranding and service upgrade, changing its name to EleBank. According to Foresight News, starting April 23, 2026, the bank's official English name will be changed from "Airstar Bank Limited" to "Ele Bank Limited."

data.title: Two Tron Addresses Freeze Over 344 Million USDT
data.description: Approximately one minute ago, Whale Alert detected the freezing of a Tron blockchain address holding 212,922,653 USDT. According to Odaily, shortly thereafter, another Tron address containing 131,288,800 USDT was also frozen.

data.title: Tether has frozen two wallets on the Tron blockchain, involving a total of 344 million USDT.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, Tether has just frozen two wallets on the Tron chain, involving a total of 344 million USDT.

data.title: Spark's Native Token SPK Staking Surpasses 500 Million
data.description:
Spark announced on the X platform that the total staking volume of its native token, SPK, has exceeded 500 million, reaching 509,969,466 tokens. According to ChainCatcher, users can participate in the fourth season of the Spark Points Program by staking SPK and earn reward points.

Previously, due to a security incident involving rsETH, there was a continuous outflow of funds from Aave. Spark has absorbed some of the funds withdrawn by large investors and institutions from Aave.

data.title: India's Central Bank: Inflation Remains Within Tolerance Range Amid Rising Supply-Side Risks
data.description: India's central bank has reported that inflation is currently within its acceptable range. According to Jin10, the bank noted that supply-side disruptions have increased the upward risks to inflation. The central bank continues to monitor these developments closely to ensure economic stability.

data.title: Bloomberg analysts: Bitcoin ETF inflows turn positive across the board, IBIT enters the top 1% of ETF inflows.
data.description: Eric Balchunas, a senior ETF analyst at Bloomberg, wrote on the X platform that Bitcoin ETF inflows have turned positive across the board, stating that "all rolling periods we track are positive," marking the first time in several months. BlackRock's IBIT has seen inflows of approximately $3 billion, placing it in the top 1% of all ETF inflow performance. However, Balchunas pointed out that several billion dollars more inflows are needed to return to the all-time high of $62.8 billion, but this at least indicates a significant recovery in investor sentiment towards Bitcoin ETFs and a restoration of market demand.

data.title: RealGo announced the completion of a funding round of over $3.5 million, with participation from Cogitent Ventures and others.
data.description: RealGo announced the completion of a funding round exceeding $3.5 million, with early-stage and strategic rounds supported by institutions and strategic partners including Animoca Brands, Cogitent Ventures, X21 Digital, Notch VC, and Becker Ventures. The funds raised will be primarily used to advance the infrastructure development of Meme 3.0, drive the upgrade and transformation of the Meme ecosystem, break away from its single-channel traffic attribute, and create an on-chain asset system that allows for collection, competition, social interaction, and monetization, ultimately realizing user ownership and value realization of Meme assets.

data.title: A Tron on-chain address holding 212,922,653 USDT has been frozen.
data.description: According to Whale Alert monitoring, about one minute ago, a Tron on-chain address holding 212,922,653 USDT was frozen.

data.title: John Lee: Risks must be considered when predicting market trends involving virtual currencies.
data.description: Before attending the Executive Council meeting, Hong Kong Chief Executive John Lee met with the media and was asked about the suspension of the basketball betting tax. He stated that the Civil Rights and Youth Development Bureau needs to conduct regular reviews and wants to manage risks before continuing to implement the basketball betting tax policy. He believes this move is appropriate. Lee emphasized that the suspension of the policy is not only due to gambling but also related to cryptocurrencies. The Hong Kong government has seen a significant increase in the trading volume of illegal gambling "prediction markets," which is related to the ability to place bets through cryptocurrencies. Therefore, the policy should not be blindly pushed forward. (HK01)

data.title: Yiming Zhang, former core quantitative researcher at Jump, receives seed funding from Millennium.
data.description: Sources say that Yiming Zhang, a former senior quantitative analyst at Jump Trading, has received seed funding from hedge fund giant Millennium Management after leaving the company and will work as an external manager. Zhang served at Jump for 17 years and was a key member of its core strategy department. His new role, which was subject to a non-compete clause, is expected to begin after the non-compete period ends. Industry insiders point out that Millennium Management has been expanding its reach by providing funding to external teams in recent years, becoming a significant "incubator" in the hedge fund industry. (BusinessInsider)

data.title: Millennium Management Backs Former Jump Trading Researcher Yiming Zhang
data.description: Former Jump Trading senior quantitative researcher Yiming Zhang has secured startup funding from hedge fund giant Millennium Management, according to Odaily. Zhang, who worked at Jump for 17 years and was a key member of the core strategy team, will operate as an external manager once his non-compete clause expires. Industry experts note that Millennium Management has been expanding its reach in recent years by financially supporting external teams, establishing itself as a significant incubator in the hedge fund sector.

data.title: Hong Kong Chief Executive Discusses Suspension of Basketball Betting Tax
data.description:
Hong Kong Chief Executive John Lee addressed the media before attending an executive meeting, discussing the suspension of the basketball betting tax. According to Odaily, Lee stated that the Youth Affairs Bureau needs to regularly review the situation and manage risks before continuing with the basketball betting tax policy, considering it an appropriate action.

Lee emphasized that the suspension is not solely due to gambling but is also related to virtual currencies. The Hong Kong government has observed a significant increase in illegal gambling 'prediction market' transactions, which are facilitated by cryptocurrency betting. Therefore, the policy should not be advanced blindly.

data.title: Iran-U.S. Talks in Pakistan May See Breakthrough Soon
data.description: On April 23, an Iranian diplomatic source informed Russian news agency RIA Novosti that preparations for negotiations between Iran and the United States in Pakistan could potentially reach a breakthrough "tonight or tomorrow." According to BlockBeats, the discussions are anticipated to address ongoing issues between the two nations. Further details on the agenda or outcomes of these talks have not been disclosed.

data.title: Iranian sources say preparations for Iran-US negotiations may see a breakthrough "tonight or tomorrow".
data.description: An Iranian diplomatic source told RIA Novosti on the 23rd that preparations for negotiations between Iran and the United States in Pakistan might see a breakthrough "tonight or tomorrow." (Xinhua)

data.title: SpaceX Acquisition of Cursor Predicted at 74% Probability on Polymarket
data.description: A recent monitoring by Odaily Seer indicates that on Polymarket, the probability of SpaceX acquiring Cursor stands at 74%. According to Odaily, the contract stipulates that if Cursor is officially announced to be acquired or merged with SpaceX by December 31, 2026, at 11:59 PM Eastern Time, the market decision will be 'Yes'. Otherwise, it will be 'No'. The conditions apply to mergers or acquisitions involving Cursor or its parent company with SpaceX or its parent company, Space Exploration Technologies Corp. The decision will be 'Yes' if an announcement is made within the market's timeframe, regardless of whether the acquisition or merger actually occurs. Partial sale announcements may also qualify if the acquiring company gains controlling interest, defined as a change in ownership sufficient to control strategic decisions, typically over 50% of equity or equivalent control through voting and governance rights. Transactions or investments that do not result in a transfer of controlling interest do not meet the criteria. The primary sources for market decisions will be official information from Cursor and SpaceX, though consensus from credible reports may also be used.

data.title: Sooth Labs Secures $50 Million Funding at $335 Million Valuation
data.description: Sooth Labs, an AI prediction laboratory founded by former Meta executives and Carnegie Mellon University professors, is completing a $50 million funding round at a valuation of $335 million. According to Odaily, the funding is led by Felicis Ventures, with participation from Yann LeCun and Jeff Dean. Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth serves as an advisor to the company. Sooth Labs specializes in multimodal AI event probability predictions, catering to sectors such as finance, defense, and insurance. The company has already provided probability forecasts for events like WHO pandemics and the public listing of Anthropic.

data.title: Brother Machi closed his long positions in HYPE, and currently has long positions in BTC and ETH worth over $80 million.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Brother Machi closed all his HYPE long positions 3 hours ago. He currently holds a 25x leveraged Ethereum long position (holding 18,000 ETH, worth approximately $41.736 million) and a 40x leveraged Bitcoin long position (holding 503 BTC, worth approximately $39 million).

data.title: GMGN will launch prediction market feature
data.description: According to information on the GMGN official website, the platform will launch a prediction market feature.

data.title: Pyth Network to Retire Pythnet Application Chain by 2026
data.description:
Pyth Network has announced that the Pythnet application chain will be officially retired in late 2026, following the approval of the OP-PIP-100 proposal. According to Foresight News, the OP-PIP-103 proposal sets the Oracle Integrity Staking (OIS) reward distribution rate parameter to zero, marking the end of the OIS reward mechanism, which began in late 2024 and attracted approximately 1 billion PYTH in staking.

Pyth Network stated that the OIS staking and penalty mechanisms remain effective, allowing current stakers to unstake and withdraw at any time. Moving forward, the network will focus on Lazer, Pyth Pro, and the data marketplace as its core infrastructure. Since its inception, the PYTH reserve has acquired about 12 million PYTH through the open market.

data.title: Hyperbot Data Reveals Recent Trading Activity
data.description: Hyperbot data indicates that three hours ago, a trader known as 麻吉大哥 closed all HYPE long positions. According to Odaily, the trader currently holds a 25x leveraged Ethereum long position with 18,000 ETH and a 40x leveraged Bitcoin long position with 503 BTC.
